seo.defaultDescription: Track your job applications, manage companies, and analyze your job search progress with Jobber.

home.title: Jobber — Track Your Job Search
home.description: Organize and manage your job search with a Kanban board, analytics, and stage tracking.

jobs.title: Jobs — Jobber
jobs.description: Browse and manage your job postings in one place.

applications.title: Applications — Jobber
applications.description: Track all your job applications and their progress through stages.

companies.title: Companies — Jobber
companies.description: Manage the companies you are applying to.

analytics.title: Analytics — Jobber
analytics.description: Get insights into your job search with detailed analytics.

blog.title: Blog — Jobber
blog.description: Tips and insights to help you land your next job.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Tips and insights for your job search

stages.recommendedDescription: Common stages used in job application processes. Click to add.

stages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the stage "{{name}}"?

hero.title: Track Your Job Applications with Confidence
hero.subtitle: Organize and manage your job search as a process, not a single action. Keep track of every stage, stay on top of deadlines, and never miss an opportunity.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful tools to streamline your entire job search journey

track.title: Track Progress
track.description: Visualize where each application stands in your job search pipeline with real-time status updates

organize.title: Stay Organized
organize.description: Keep all your resumes, companies, and job postings in one centralized place

analytics.title: Get Insights
analytics.description: Understand your job search patterns and optimize your strategy with detailed analytics

stages.title: Custom Stages
stages.description: Define your own application stages and track progress through each step of the hiring process

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Get started in minutes with a simple 4-step process

step1.title: Add Companies
step1.description: Create a list of companies you're interested in working for

step2.title: Upload Resumes
step2.description: Store multiple resume versions tailored to different roles

step3.title: Track Applications
step3.description: Log each application and monitor its progress through stages

step4.title: Analyze Results
step4.description: Review analytics to understand what's working and improve your strategy

demo.title: See It in Action
demo.subtitle: A powerful Kanban board to visualize your entire job search at a glance

welcome.title: Welcome to Jobber!
welcome.subtitle: Let's get you set up in just a few steps

company.title: Add Your First Company
company.description: Start by adding a company you're interested in or have applied to. You can always add more later.

resume.title: Upload a Resume
resume.description: Upload your resume so you can link it to applications and track which version you used.

job.title: Create a Job
job.description: Add a job posting you'd like to track. Link it to a company and start monitoring your progress.

stages.title: Set Up Stages
stages.description: Define the steps of your hiring process — Applied, Phone Screen, Interview, Offer — and track progress through each one.

analytics.title: View Analytics
analytics.description: See detailed insights about your job search — response rates, time in stages, resume effectiveness, and more.

extension.title: Chrome Extension
extension.description: Install the Jobber Chrome extension to save job postings from any website with one click. AI-powered parsing fills in all the details automatically.

done.title: You're All Set!
done.description: You're ready to start tracking your job applications. Good luck with your search!

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Insights and statistics about your job search
analytics.noDataDescription: Add your first application to see analytics
